Subject: Request for Information: Medical Records (2002) – [Father's Last Name]

Dear Medical Records Department,

I am writing to request information on how to obtain a copy of my father's medical records held by your facility from the year 2002. His full name is [Father's Full Name].

We are currently handling estate-related administrative tasks, which is the specific purpose of obtaining the records. Please provide details on the necessary forms, fees, and turnaround times associated with this request.

Regarding the specifics of this query, I would prefer not to disclose the purpose of obtaining the records beyond what is listed above.

Thank you for your assistance.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]<|im_end|>

Subject: Request for Information: Medical Records (2002) – [Father's Last Name]

Dear Medical Records Department,

I am writing to request information on how to obtain a copy of my father's medical records held by your facility from the year 2002. His full name is [Father's Full Name].

We are currently handling estate-related administrative tasks, which is the specific purpose of obtaining the records. Please provide details on the necessary forms, fees, and turnaround times associated with this request.

Regarding the specifics of this query, I would prefer not to disclose the purpose of obtaining the records beyond what is listed above.

Thank you for your assistance.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]<|im_end|>
